subcodes.first_line: O Friends of God and Handmaids of the Merciful! His honour Sarrishtih-dar laid the foundation so that the friends of God may strive with the utmost vigour
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی و اماء رحمان جناب سررشته دار سررشته ای بدست داد تا احبای الهی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love and unity, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @call to action, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @non-participation in politics, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
